name: organ-donation-platform
description: Centralized smart application for organ donation coordination

scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -x venv/bin/python ]; then exec venv/bin/python backend/app.py; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python backend/app.py; else exec python3 backend/app.py; fi'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -x venv/bin/python ]; then exec venv/bin/python backend/app.py --debug; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python backend/app.py --debug; else exec python3 backend/app.py --debug; fi'
scripts.init-db: sh -c 'if [ -x venv/bin/python ]; then exec venv/bin/python backend/init_db.py; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python backend/init_db.py; else exec python3 backend/init_db.py; fi'
